files.reason: Wait for live commit parity after Railway upload, then run the full ship check automatically.
Adds the live verification, deploy handoff, and real proof-call scripts used to prove the shipped path.
Always trigger post-call intelligence after call end so summaries are attempted on production calls.
files.excerpt:
diff --git a/server.ts b/server.ts
index 21e48b6..1d3b2c4 100644
--- a/server.ts
+++ b/server.ts
@@ -639,2 +639,7 @@ app.post("/api/auth/google/exchange", express.json(), async (req: Request, res:
 const twilioValidate = (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
+  // Operator-only Twilio smoke routes are protected by dashboardAuth later in
+  // the route chain. They are not signed by Twilio, so do not require a Twilio
+  // webhook signature before dashboardAuth can evaluate the operator key.
+  if (["/test-webhook", "/test-call", "/test-sms"].includes(req.path)) return next();
+
   const authToken = env.TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN;

files.reason: Tightens buyer activation/login flow so payment follows activation request and invite-based access is clearer.
